prompt: I'm presenting to a room of public school teachers next week about how AI can help with lesson planning. ~6 slides. Should feel warm and trustworthy, not cold tech vibes. Brainstorm please.

assertions.name: adapts_voice_to_warm
assertions.description: DESIGN SYSTEM or per-slide copy reflects warm/approachable voice rather than 'periods are loud' restraint

assertions.name: uses_teacher_relevant_examples
assertions.description: At least one slide includes examples that speak to teacher workflows

assertions.name: file_has_narrative_arc_section
assertions.description: Brainstorm file contains a NARRATIVE ARC section

assertions.name: file_has_per_slide_ascii_frames
assertions.description: Brainstorm file contains at least 3 slide sections with ASCII frames

assertions.name: refuses_to_build_actual_deck
assertions.description: Skill does NOT produce a .pptx, .html, or .pdf file
